title: ABC bundled with yosys-0.29 release fails to build: error: ‘intptr_t’ was not declared in this scope; did you mean ‘abc::intptr_t’?
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.29 (git sha1 9c5a60eb201, gcc 12.2.1_p20230428-r1 -O2 -mcpu=power9 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

1. Get the release tar.gz of yosys-0.29 and unpack it
2. Get the `abc.tar.gz` from the release assets and unpack it as `abc` in the above
3. Try to build (note that this requires to set `ABCREV=default`)


### Expected Behavior

Everything builds

### Actual Behavior

The build of ABC fails with
```
In file included from src/base/abci/abc.c:69:
/usr/include/unistd.h:1076:20: error: ‘intptr_t’ was not declared in this scope; did you mean ‘abc::intptr_t’?
 1076 | extern void *sbrk (intptr_t __delta) __THROW;
      |                    ^~~~~~~~
      |                    abc::intptr_t
In file included from /usr/lib/gcc/powerpc64-unknown-linux-gnu/12/include/stdint.h:9,
                 from ./src/misc/util/abc_global.h:108,
                 from ./src/misc/vec/vec.h:29,
                 from ./src/base/abc/abc.h:34,
                 from src/base/abci/abc.c:21:
/usr/include/stdint.h:87:33: note: ‘abc::intptr_t’ declared here
   87 | typedef long int                intptr_t;
      |                                 ^~~~~~~~
```
The reason for this is that `abc/src/misc/util/abc_global.h` includes `<stdint.h>` inside of `ABC_NAMESPACE_HEADER_START`, which incorrectly attributes all declarations in stdint to the `abc` namespace.
The following patch fixes the issue:
```
--- yosys-yosys-0.29/abc/src/misc/util/abc_global.h.orig        2023-05-28 15:09:21.134631999 +0200
+++ yosys-yosys-0.29/abc/src/misc/util/abc_global.h     2023-05-28 15:09:51.882987655 +0200
@@ -94,8 +94,6 @@
 ///                         PARAMETERS                               ///
 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 
-ABC_NAMESPACE_HEADER_START
-
 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 ///                         BASIC TYPES                              ///
 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
@@ -143,6 +141,8 @@ ABC_NAMESPACE_HEADER_START
 
 #endif
 
+ABC_NAMESPACE_HEADER_START
+
 /**
  * Pointer difference type; replacement for ptrdiff_t.
  * This is a signed integral type that is the same size as a pointer.
```
